title: One Night in Amsterdam: The Unsolved Murder of Asha Degree

scenes.text: A young girl vanished, and the truth has never emerged.
It happened in Amsterdam, Netherlands, in 2000.
Asha Degree was last seen on February 14, 2000, walking away from her home.
Despite multiple leads, her case remains open and unsolved.
scenes.label: STILL UNSOLVED

scenes.text: Follow for daily true crime mysteries.

description: 📍 Amsterdam, Netherlands - 2000. Asha Degree vanished on February 14, leaving her family and authorities seeking answers. Follow for daily cold cases!
